name: thewhyman

metadata.description: Legacy mirror marketplace — canonical is Exponential-OS/agent-marketplace (@xos). This path still resolves for backwards compatibility.

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v4.23.0 - FORAGE: Epistemic Foraging flywheel. Weekly /forage tool-discovery loop: FORAGE (marketplace diff + GitHub trending + recommender + P20 web sweep) -> SCORE against the week's WORKSPACE session-ledger friction (not novelty) -> VERIFY in a throwaway worktree -> PROPOSE (install HUMAN-GATED, no auto-install; per-candidate approval ticket with evidence + rollback, max 3/run) -> CODIFY (pending/keepers/rejects/deferred + memory entry + audit ticket).

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: Career OS v0.27.0 — AI-powered career management system. Persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. outreach-fact-check (T4 immunity) + interviewer-research (panel prep automation).

_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example - marketplace owner/author attribution is legitimate
